problem: Can protein structure be predicted from sequence in real time without AlphaFold compute cost?
hypothesis: If Quantum annealing for optimization problems is applied to alphafold, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
